zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert de Shelton Knight於1245年出生在英國諾福爾可雪登時，他的父親Ralph De Shelton 4th Lord Of Shelton70歲，母親Katherine de Elleigh40歲。他和Isabell De Eleigh   De Elye至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1305年9月23日在他的家鄉享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert de Shelton Knight于1245年出生在英国諾福爾可雪登时，他的父亲Ralph De Shelton 4th Lord Of Shelton70岁，母亲Katherine de Elleigh40岁。他和Isabell De Eleigh   De Elye至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1305年9月23日在他的家乡享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Shelton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire): habitational name primarily from Shelton (Nottinghamshire), but also from Shelton (Bedfordshire, Norfolk, Shropshire, and Staffordshire). The placenames all derive from Old English scelf ‘rock, ledge, shelf’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert de Shelton Knight was born in 1245, in Shelton, Norfolk, England, his father, Ralph De Shelton 4th Lord Of Shelton, was 70 and his mother, Katherine de Elleigh, was 40. He had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Isabell De Eleigh   De Elye. He died on 23 September 1305, in his hometown, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert de Shelton Knight est né en 1245, à Shelton, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Ralph De Shelton 4th Lord Of Shelton, avait 70 ans et sa mère, Katherine d’Elleigh, avait 40 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Isabell De Eleigh   De Elye. Il est décédé le 23 septembre 1305, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert de Shelton Knight 1245 in Shelton, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph De Shelton 4th Lord Of Shelton 70 und seine Mutter Katherine de Elleigh 40. Er hatte mit Isabell De Eleigh   De Elye mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 23. September 1305 im Alter von 60 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert de Shelton Knight è nato il nel 1245 nel Shelton, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Ralph De Shelton 4th Lord Of Shelton, aveva 70 anni e il suo madre, Katherine de Elleigh, aveva 40 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Isabell De Eleigh   De Elye. Morì il 23 settembre 1305, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Shelton Knightが1245年にイギリスノーフォルクシェルトンで生まれた時，父Ralph De Shelton 4th Lord Of Sheltonは70歳，母Katherine de Elleighは40歳であった。彼はIsabell De Eleigh   De Elyeとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1305年9月23日に故郷で60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Shelton Knight(이)가 1245년 영국 노르폴크 셸턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph De Shelton 4th Lord Of Shelton(은)는 70세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine de Elleigh(은)는 40세였다. 그는 Isabell De Eleigh   De Elye(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1305년 9월 23일 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert de Shelton Knight nasceu em 1245, em Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph De Shelton 4th Lord Of Shelton, tinha 70 anos e sua mãe, Katherine de Elleigh, tinha 40 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Isabell De Eleigh   De Elye. Ele faleceu em 23 de setembro de 1305, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert de Shelton Knight родился в 1245 г. в местности шелтон, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph De Shelton 4th Lord Of Shelton было 70 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine de Elleigh, 40. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Isabell De Eleigh   De Elye. Он умер 23 сентября 1305 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert de Shelton Knight nació en 1245, en Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph De Shelton 4th Lord Of Shelton, tenía 70 años y su mamá, Katherine de Elleigh, tenía 40 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Isabell De Eleigh   De Elye. Murió el 23 de septiembre de 1305, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años.
